basics.name: Vishal Ramesh
basics.summary: Results-driven Machine Learning Engineer with over 5 years of experience designing, building, and deploying scalable end-to-end ML solutions in production cloud environments. Expertise in developing production-grade systems that handle millions of requests daily, including advanced NLP pipelines, decision support systems, and robust large-scale model deployment infrastructures. Specializes in microservice architecture (Java, Spring Boot) and MLOps best practices, effectively translating complex enterprise challenges into impactful, data-driven applications.

highlights: Directed transition of features to open-source LLaMA and Qwen models, utilizing quantization techniques and assessing output quality with MLflow's LLM-as-a-Judge framework.
Spearheading enhancements to the RCA product feature to support higher customer data volumes and improved anomaly detection throughput.
Architecting an organization-wide evaluation framework for agent-based AI features, standardizing quality measurement across agentic workflows

Engineered and implemented a production-scale Custom Intent Detection microservice, enabling customers to train models on their own data, overseeing 10,000+ live custom models handling approximately 1 million daily requests.
Designed and implemented an organization-wide MLOps framework covering model monitoring, feedback loops, and data and model version tracking to enhance operational efficiency
Built an Entity Extraction service to identify and extract structured entities from support tickets and live chat conversations.
Designed and implemented a Query-to-Graph agentic system, enabling customers to build analytical dashboards and conduct data-driven conversations using natural language queries

Developed and deployed a Root Cause Analysis (RCA) product feature leveraging Generative AI and data analysis techniques to proactively alert customer business leaders about anomalies in their key business metrics, along with AI-generated potential root causes.
Developed and integrated a conversational AI model for small talk interactions within the chatbot framework, improving user experience and dialogue effectiveness.
Designed and deployed a production-grade Embedding service by quantizing the LaBSE model, building a high-performance inference layer, and deploying it for large-scale production use.
Implemented a Question-and-Answer (QnA) retrieval system and integrated it with the existing AI chatbot to improve response accuracy and coverage.
Enhanced the AI chatbot to incorporate communication channel-based context, enabling more relevant and personalized bot responses across different messaging channels.
Implemented Global Feedback Flows for the chatbot platform, enabling structured collection of user feedback to drive continuous improvement

education.area: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
